llvm::object::MachORebaseEntry Class Reference

#include <MachO.h>

 MachORebaseEntry (ArrayRef< uint8_t > opcodes, bool is64Bit)

Friends

class MachOObjectFile

Detailed Description

MachORebaseEntry encapsulates the current state in the decompression of
rebasing opcodes. This allows you to iterate through the compressed table of rebasing using: for (const llvm::object::MachORebaseEntry &Entry : Obj->rebaseTable()) { }

Definition at line 108 of file Object/MachO.h.
